topic.title: What Is CapCut and Why Use It for Social Media Editing?
topic.shortdesc: Learn what CapCut is and why it's an excellent choice for creating social media videos.

section.title: What is CapCut?
section.p: CapCut is a free, user-friendly video editing application available on iOS, Android, and desktop platforms. It's designed specifically for creating short-form social media content like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

section.title: Why Choose CapCut?
section.p: Easy to Use: No prior editing experience needed.
Powerful Features: Includes transitions, effects, text, music, and more.
Free: All essential features are completely free.
Quick Edits: Create polished videos in minutes.
